text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
It came as soon as the date changed. What a nice
birthday message. ♪

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, good. ♪ I'm glad it got to you. Hehe, when I
looked back later, I noticed I typed "gappw
bipthdaw" on accident, though.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I had heard, you see, that all the kids are sending
"happy birthday" right at midnight these days,
using their cellular phones.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
You'd gone through all that trouble to teach me
how to send emails, so I figured I'd give it a go.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
When I saw your message, it made me feel all
snuggly and warm, even in my bed. ♪

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Well, seeing the smile on your face makes it
worth all the while. ♪

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: That's right—I made a big batch of haskap pickles... for you... yawn...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Um, Acute? Are you okay? You look sleepy.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Oh, I'm fine, dearie! Just... I'm not normally up and about so late at night... Think I... yawn... snooze...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Acute?! You didn't have to go to all that trouble!
